description: Letter in which Shelomo, who was appointed to a new post, complains that he found only opponents and asks advice of the Nagid. He also complains about his illness (l. 16). (Information from Goitein's index cards.) Same sender: T-S AS 145.56 (PGPID 17335).
tags: illness: marad, communal, Illness, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב שבו שלמה, שמונה לתפקיד חדש, מתלונן שמצא רק מתנגדים ומבקש עצה מהנגיד. כן מתלונן על מחלתו.
